Title: Notable events — 2026-05-05 (UTC)
Date: 2026-05-05

One-line summary: Yes — multiple ongoing geopolitical and commercial disruptions (the Iran conflict and related energy/transport risks) plus major cultural and transport stories make 2026-05-05 notable globally.

Top 5 notable items (global) — top 5 with ties
1. Iran conflict (ongoing) — Continued military activity and regional tensions are disrupting shipping in the Strait of Hormuz and shaping diplomatic/oil responses. Source: Al Jazeera live coverage / regional reporting (https://www.aljazeera.com/news/liveblog/2026/5/1/iran-war-live-tehran-says-us-ports-siege-intolerable-trump-mulls-action)
2. Spirit Airlines shutdown / travel disruption — Budget carrier abruptly ceased operations after a rescue deal stalled, stranding passengers and affecting regional travel. Source: Reuters (https://www.reuters.com/business/spirit-airlines-prepares-cease-operations-after-rescue-deal-stalls-wsj-reports-2026-05-01/)
3. Met Gala 2026 (culture) — The Metropolitan Museum Gala (red-carpet coverage) remains a major cultural story around this date. Source: Reuters photos (https://www.reuters.com/pictures/met-gala-2026-latest-photos-red-carpet-2026-05-04/XIJYGBVWJRMHNLL6MALISTPLTA/)
4. NHL Draft Lottery scheduled (sports) — NHL Draft Lottery event set for May 5, drawing attention across North American sports media. Source: Reuters (https://www.reuters.com/sports/nhl-draft-lottery-set-may-5--flm-2026-04-18/)
5 (ties). Global observances on May 5 —
   - Cinco de Mayo (Mexico; widely observed in US) — anniversaries and cultural events. Source: Britannica (https://www.britannica.com/topic/Cinco-de-Mayo)
   - World Asthma Day (global — GINA) — awareness campaigns and WHO/NGO events. Source: GINA (https://ginasthma.org/world-asthma-day-tuesday-may-5-2026/)
   - National Teacher Day / Teacher Appreciation (USA) — part of Teacher Appreciation Week. Source: NEA (https://www.nea.org/about-nea/media-center/press-releases/nea-celebrates-national-teacher-appreciation-week-2)

Holidays & observances (selected)
- Cinco de Mayo — Mexico (national observance in Puebla; cultural celebrations across Mexico and Mexican communities in the U.S.)
- World Asthma Day — global (first Tuesday in May; 2026 theme and materials published by GINA)
- National Teacher Day (USA) — part of Teacher Appreciation Week (May 4–8)
- Liberation Day / Bevrijdingsdag — Netherlands (May 5)
- International Day of the Midwife — global (May 5; WHO/ICM events)

Notable anniversaries (historical events on May 5)
- 1818 — Birth of Karl Marx (source: Britannica)
- 1862 — Battle of Puebla (commemorated as Cinco de Mayo) (source: Britannica)
- 1945 — Liberation Day (end of German occupation) in the Netherlands (annual observance May 5)
- 1961 — Alan Shepard’s Freedom 7 suborbital flight; first American in space (May 5, 1961) (source: National Air and Space Museum)

Major current news headlines (3–6)
- Iran conflict continues to drive regional instability and energy-market concern — live reporting and analysis show persistent military action and diplomatic strain (Al Jazeera live coverage; Understanding War analysis).
  Source: https://www.aljazeera.com/news/liveblog/2026/5/1/iran-war-live-tehran-says-us-ports-siege-intolerable-trump-mulls-action

- Spirit Airlines prepares to cease operations / travel chaos — sudden collapse after rescue talks stalled; ongoing passenger disruption and industry impacts. Source: Reuters
  https://www.reuters.com/business/spirit-airlines-prepares-cease-operations-after-rescue-deal-stalls-wsj-reports-2026-05-01/

- OPEC+/Gulf energy responses and production planning amid Strait of Hormuz disruption — producers signal limited output adjustments while monitoring shipping chokepoint. Source: Al Jazeera (OPEC coverage) / Reuters reporting.
  https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2026/5/3/opec-announces-symbolic-oil-output-rise-during-strait-of-hormuz-closure

- Met Gala 2026: red-carpet coverage and reviewer round-ups continue across outlets (culture). Source: Reuters photos
  https://www.reuters.com/pictures/met-gala-2026-latest-photos-red-carpet-2026-05-04/XIJYGBVWJRMHNLL6MALISTPLTA/

Short note — markets / tech / cultural events today
- Markets: Energy markets remain sensitive to developments in the Strait of Hormuz and to headlines from the Iran conflict; OPEC+ statements and any shipping updates are primary drivers for oil prices.
- Tech / cultural: Met Gala coverage is the main cultural headline; no major single-day global tech product launches identified for 2026-05-05 in top media searches.

Sources / References (selected)
- Al Jazeera — Iran war live coverage: https://www.aljazeera.com/news/liveblog/2026/5/1/iran-war-live-tehran-says-us-ports-siege-intolerable-trump-mulls-action
- Reuters — Spirit Airlines: https://www.reuters.com/business/spirit-airlines-prepares-cease-operations-after-rescue-deal-stalls-wsj-reports-2026-05-01/
- Reuters — NHL Draft Lottery: https://www.reuters.com/sports/nhl-draft-lottery-set-may-5--flm-2026-04-18/
- Reuters — Met Gala photos: https://www.reuters.com/pictures/met-gala-2026-latest-photos-red-carpet-2026-05-04/XIJYGBVWJRMHNLL6MALISTPLTA/
- GINA — World Asthma Day 2026: https://ginasthma.org/world-asthma-day-tuesday-may-5-2026/
- Britannica — Cinco de Mayo / Karl Marx: https://www.britannica.com/topic/Cinco-de-Mayo ; https://www.britannica.com/topic/Karl-Marx
- NEA — National Teacher Appreciation Week / Day (May 4–8, 2026): https://www.nea.org/about-nea/media-center/press-releases/nea-celebrates-national-teacher-appreciation-week-2
- WHO / International Confederation of Midwives — International Day of the Midwife events (May 5): https://www.who.int/news-room/events/detail/2026/05/05/default-calendar/who-webinar-for-the-international-day-of-the-midwife-2026

(Prepared using Tavily CLI searches and authoritative news/organizational sources.)
